title: The National Commission for Backward Classes (Repeal) Act, 2018
full_text: The National Commission for Backward Classes (Repeal) Act, 2018 राष्ट्री य पिछड़ा वर्ग आयोग (निरसन) अधिनियम, 2018 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: A2018-24 Act Number: 24 Enactment Date: 2018-08-14 Act Year: 2018 Short Title: The National Commission for Backward Classes (Repeal) Act, 2018 Hindi Title: राष्ट्री य पिछड़ा वर्ग आयोग (निरसन) अधिनियम, 2018 Long Title: An Act to repeal the National Commission for Backward Classes Act, 1993.
